subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1913, from Mahmud's diary
subcodes.first_line: I see the people ... like bees or ants, coming and going by troops, surging past like waves, continually engrossed in their business.
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
